steps.title: Locate Miguel's stated hopes
steps.content: The passage directly states: “Miguel was hoping not only to meet us but to make the acquaintance of the poet himself at Mamá's house.” This reveals exactly two things Miguel hoped to accomplish — meet the sisters and meet the famous poet.

steps.title: Match the signal to the answer
steps.content: Choice D directly captures what the passage says: Miguel hopes to be introduced to both the sisters and their father. Choices A, B, and C each add motivations not mentioned in the text, such as seeking instruction or mentorship. That matches choice D — D is correct.
